center.name: Sri Lankamalleswara Wildlife Sanctuary
center.summary: Sri Lankamalleswara Wildlife Sanctuary是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Jerdon's courser，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is currently known only from the Sri Lankamalleswara Wildlife Sanctuary, and Sri Penusila Narasimha Wildlife Sanctuary where it inhabits sparse scrub forest with patches of bare ground
